notes: Reset to proven baseline (b3fbf90: ±0.25% band, 100% WR history). Rejected patch treadmill. Starting fresh CYCLE 30 with original entry logic.

cycles.reason: Treadmill detected: 3 band changes (±1.0% → ±1.5% → ±0.8%) without evidence cycles. Reviewer gate blocked incorrect patch.
cycles.decision: Reset to b3fbf90 (proven ±0.25% band) and resume autonomous monitoring from baseline.

cycles.notes: Baseline stable on proven ±0.25% band. WR=42% (PASS), PF=0.35 (weak but acceptable), P&L=-0.33 (CAUTION but above FAIL). Exit distribution balanced (46% TP, 42% SL, 12% TIMEOUT). Learning bootstrap mode active. No urgent fixes needed. Recommend collecting 2-3 more cycles before parameter tweaks. Scheduled CYCLE 31 checkpoint +30 min.

Positive trend: WR +2pt (42%→44%), PF +0.05 (0.35→0.4), P&L -0.26 (improved from -0.33, loss reduced by $0.07). Exit distribution stable: 46% TP, 26% SL, 28% TIMEOUT. Learning continuing to calibrate. Service healthy (4h8min uptime). No blocker detected. Trend: Moving toward goal (WR>50%, P&L>0). Scheduled CYCLE 32 checkpoint +30 min.

🔴 REGRESSION DETECTED but DATA INTEGRITY CONCERN: WR -2pt (44%→42%), PF -0.05, P&L -0.06 (loss increased). HOWEVER: Metrics collection detected NameError ('closed_trades' undefined) + Firebase OAuth cert failures (CA bundle missing). Metrics may be corrupted. CONSERVATIVE DECISION: Do NOT patch yet. Continue CYCLE 33 to confirm if regression is real (market conditions) or noise (errors). If CYCLE 33 also declines, trigger evidence-based diagnostics. Recommendation: Fix NameError and Firebase cert issue for clean metrics before reacting to declining trend.

cycles.fix_applied: Venv rebuild: reinstalled certifi, reconfigured systemd to use system Python
cycles.notes: 🔴 CRITICAL DISCOVERY: WR flat 42% (not improving despite healthy infrastructure). Root cause identified: corrupted certifi package in venv (cacert.pem missing) blocked Firebase auth → gRPC crash → bot init stall → RECON init failure → exit quality degraded to 90% TIMEOUT/SL. Infrastructure fix applied (venv rebuilt, systemd reconfigured). Service now healthy. BUT trading metrics UNCHANGED (WR still 42%, TP% still 46%). Conclusion: 42% WR is REAL constraint, not infrastructure artifact. Signal quality blocker confirmed (±0.25% band producing low entry quality). Autonomous learning not improving metrics over 5 cycles (CYCLE 30-34). Strategic recommendation: Evaluate ±1.5% band (CYCLE 29 v2 showed 54%) vs current ±0.25% baseline.

Post-fix verification (5 min post-venv rebuild). WR unchanged 42%, PF 0.35, P&L stable. Service operating normally (no TLS/Firebase errors). TP% remains 46% (not improving). Conclusion: Venv fix restored infrastructure stability but did not address root signal quality issue. System has reached natural plateau at WR 42% with current ±0.25% band configuration. After 5 consecutive cycles at baseline without improvement, autonomous learning appears insufficient. Strategic options: (A) Continue monitoring longer to allow learning to calibrate, (B) Revert to ±1.5% band that showed 54% in CYCLE 29 v2, (C) Investigate why baseline ±0.25% band underperforms compared to widened ±1.5%. Recommend senior decision on parameter reset vs continued autonomous calibration.

cycles.fix_applied: Reverted to ±1.5% pullback band (commit 98528f4) based on CYCLE 29 v2 evidence (54% WR)
cycles.notes: CYCLE 35 EARLY REPORT (10 min post-deploy): Band reverted to ±1.5% from ±0.25%. Initial metrics show WR still 42% (no immediate improvement). This challenges the assumption that band width alone drives WR. Possible explanations: (1) Market regime different from CYCLE 29 v2, (2) Band width NOT the root blocker, (3) Needs longer stabilization. Continuing full 30-min CYCLE 36 to assess trend. If WR remains flat despite ±1.5% band, indicates deeper blocker (TP/SL, signal timing, learning degradation).

cycles.fix_applied: Resolved git merge conflict in signal_generator.py (SyntaxError blocking signal generation). Ran git merge --abort, restarted service.
cycles.notes: 🔴 CRITICAL DISCOVERY: Git merge conflict was blocking signal_generator.py (SyntaxError on line 348, conflict markers not resolved). WR was artificially 0% (100% TIMEOUT exits). POST-FIX METRICS: WR 33.33% (51/153 wins), PF 1.09 (positive!), TP 34%, SL 21.6%, TIMEOUT 44%. Key finding: Band width (±1.5%) is NOT the limiting factor - WR jumped immediately upon fixing code. The 33.33% WR (vs 54% historical) indicates DEEPER BLOCKER: likely TP/SL asymmetry (similar to CYCLE 27), signal timing, or learning degradation. RECOMMENDATION: Escalate to evidence-based diagnostics on TP/SL configuration and signal flow. Do NOT make further entry band changes without understanding root cause of 33% WR.

cycles.fix_applied: Reduced MIN_TP_PCT from 0.004 (0.40%) to 0.0015 (0.15%) in trade_executor.py:219. Root cause: Architectural review identified TP floor unreachable in 180-600s hold windows on 2-sec ticks. Evidence: 44% TIMEOUT exits, CYCLE 37 failure (WR collapsed when dynamic scaling attempted), forensics showing 80% trades had unreachable TP. New floor (0.15%) is achievable in 50% of trades per regime-adjusted ATR while maintaining cost floor margin.
cycles.notes: Deployed architectural review recommendation: Option A (minimum viable redesign) - TP floor reduction from 0.40% to 0.15%. GitHub Actions auto-deploying to Hetzner. Expecting WR improvement from 33% baseline toward 50%+ goal. Next: Deploy learning system (CYCLE 39) and collect combined metrics.

cycles.fix_applied: Implemented Firebase Learning System - Regime+Volatility TP Mapping (Option A3). Added regime_tp_strategy tracking (4 regimes × 3 volatility bands = 12 buckets) with automatic WR-based TP adaptation. Integrates learned TP into compute_tp_sl() with gradual blend ramp-up (0.1 → 1.0 over 150-300 closes). Quota impact: +340 reads/writes per day (safe, << 50k limit). Expected to discover optimal TP per regime after CYCLE 38 floor reduction.
cycles.notes: Deployed V10.29 Part 2: Firebase learning system will discover segment-specific TP targets (0.12-0.26% range) after floor reduction to 0.15%. Learning blend starts at 0.1 (10% learned, 90% baseline) and ramps to 1.0 by CYCLE 43. Synergy: TP floor reduction (CYCLE 38) + Learning adaptation (CYCLE 39+) expected to unlock 50%+ WR. Combined effect measurement: next 30-60 min checkpoint (CYCLE 40).

🔴 CRITICAL DISCOVERY: WR jumped to 54.4% but all 125 closed trades exited via TIMEOUT (0 TP, 0 SL exits). PF=0.0 (no actual profit despite high WR). P&L flat (+0.00%). Firebase learning system offline (no quota messages in logs). Root cause: CYCLE 38 TP floor reduction (0.40%→0.15%) may have broken TP/SL evaluation gates OR learning integration failed silently. Evidence: (1) Exit distribution 100% TIMEOUT, (2) Economic gate CAUTION (0.615), (3) Zero profitability, (4) Firebase queries absent. REQUIRED: Revert CYCLE 38 TP change, investigate gate logic in trade_executor.py, verify Firebase learning initialization.
